input.headline: Will life insurance be worth it for seniors in 2026? The right life insurance policy (at the right price) could be valuable for seniors in 2026. Here's why.

raw.headline: Will life insurance be worth it for seniors in 2026? The right life insurance policy (at the right price) could be valuable for seniors in 2026. Here's why.

winner: Sure, I'll get you a senior discount on my life insurance policy—just promise to die after 2026.

candidates.text: Why did the senior buy a life insurance policy in 2026? Because he wanted to make sure his funeral was *premium*!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses wordplay with 'premium' (both high quality and cost), and ties into the topic of life insurance. However, it lacks deeper specificity about seniors in 2026 and could be more surprising."}

candidates.text: Why did the senior citizen bring a ladder to the life insurance office? He heard they were raising the premiums—way up high!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses a surprising twist with the ladder, and ties into the headline's theme of rising premiums. However, it lacks deeper specificity about seniors or life insurance in 2026."}

candidates.text: I bought a life insurance policy so I’d have something to live *after* I die—turns out it just pays my funeral to say "no, I’m fine, thanks.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the punchline feels a bit forced and lacks natural flow. It also slightly misses the mark on directly tying to the headline's context about seniors in 2026."}

candidates.text: Why would a senior need life insurance? Because by 2026, they’ll finally have something worth living for—they’ll be too old to spend their policy payout before they die.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific to the topic, but the humor feels a bit dark and relies on a morbid premise that may not land well with all audiences."}

candidates.text: Sure, I'll get you a senior discount on my life insurance policy—just promise to die after 2026.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses wordplay on 'senior discount' and the timeline mentioned in the headline, and delivers a surprising twist. However, it's slightly edgy and may not appeal to all audiences."}
